block_02: We would like to inform you that May 1, 2020, Labor Day, is a public holiday in the European Union. Due to the holiday, IQ Option’s trading schedule will be subject to changes.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are highlighted below.
block_22: Note: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over the Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
block_23: Note: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions.
block_24: Should you have any questions, do not hesitate to get in touch with our Support team.
